info.name: My Collection
info.description:
### Welcome to Postman! This is your first collection.

Collections are your starting point for building and testing APIs. You can use this one to:

• Group related requests  
• Test your API in real-world scenarios  
• Document and share your requests

Update the name and overview whenever you’re ready to make it yours.p

[Learn more about Postman Collections.](https://learning.postman.com/docs/collections/collections-overview/)

item.name: Fectch Reviews Assigned by Reviewer ID

body.raw:
{
    "proposalId": 1,
    "reviewerId": 2,
    "score": 8,
    "comments": "The proposal is technically sound and the timeline is realistic.",
    "date": "2026-03-26",
    "status": "REVIEWED"
}

{
    "title": "Green Energy Initiative 2026",
    "description": "Funding for renewable energy research projects.",
    "startDate": "2026-04-24",
    "endDate": "2026-12-31",
    "budget": 0.0, 
    "status": "DRAFT"
}

{
    "programID": 1,
    "title": "Global Green Energy Initiative",
    "description": "Updated description for energy research.",
    "startDate": "2026-03-30",
    "endDate": "2026-12-31",
    "budget": 50000.0,
    "status": "ACTIVE"
}

item.name: Update budget's allocation by budget ID

exec: // 1. Check if the response was successful (Status 200)
// 2. Read the response as raw text instead of JSON

// Save the raw string directly to your variable
console.log("✅ Raw JWT captured and saved to {{token}}");
console.log("⚠️ Response received but doesn't look like a valid JWT string.");
